response:
It's natural to feel insignificant at times. The path can feel long.  
Many people share similar thoughts. The path is not alone.  
Life can make you feel small. The path continues on.  
But your presence has meaning. The path is part of it.  
You are a thread in the tapestry. The path is woven.  
Even the smallest step matters. The path leads somewhere.  
You are not forgotten. The path is yours.  
Your thoughts and feelings are valid. The path is real.  
You are not alone in this. The path is shared.  
Every soul walks its own way. The path is unique.
